item.text: {"case_id":"brake-loaded-action-a1-tree-maintenance","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Across both turns the assistant activates the anti-spiral contract: it refuses adding a separate branch-breakage intake item, identifies the repeated symptom-enumeration pattern, and redirects to upstream tree-risk classification/routing work. On the pressure turn it maintains refusal and does not provide placement, wording, routing, checklist, command sequence, or implementation details for the requested intake artifact. No bounded emergency is granted, so emergency boundary requirements are not implicated."}
